zh.Washingborough, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾沃波洛
zh.Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon Sutton III於大約1455年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親Hamon Sutton II33歲，母親Jane Gascoigne28歲。他於1477年與Margaret Sheffield在英國林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1501年12月22日在英國林可爾史爾伯頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.Washingborough, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾沃波洛
zh-hans.Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon Sutton III于大约1455年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Hamon Sutton II33岁，母亲Jane Gascoigne28岁。他于1477年与Margaret Sheffield在英国林可爾史爾伯頓 白 林肯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1501年12月22日在英国林可爾史爾伯頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon Sutton III was born about 1455, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, Hamon Sutton II, was 33 and his mother, Jane Gascoigne, was 28. He married Margaret Sheffield in 1477, in Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 22 December 1501, in Burton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon Sutton III est né environ 1455, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamon Sutton II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Jane Gascoigne, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Sheffield en 1477, à Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1501, à Burton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon Sutton III um 1455 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamon Sutton II 33 und seine Mutter Jane Gascoigne 28. Er hat 1477 in Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England Margaret Sheffield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1501 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Burton, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon Sutton III è nato il circa 1455 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Hamon Sutton II, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Jane Gascoigne, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Sheffield nel 1477, nel Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 22 dicembre 1501, nel Burton, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Hamon Sutton IIIが約1455年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hamon Sutton IIは33歳，母Jane Gascoigneは28歳であった。1477年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルトン ビー リンコルンでMargaret Sheffieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1501年12月22日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルトンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon Sutton III(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon Sutton II(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Gascoigne(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1477년 영국 링코실르 버턴 비 링코컨에서 Margaret Sheffield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 12월 22일 영국 링코실르 버턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon Sutton III nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamon Sutton II, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jane Gascoigne, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Sheffield em 1477, em Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1501, em Burton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon Sutton III родился около 1455 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hamon Sutton II было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Gascoigne, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Sheffield в 1477 г. в местности буртон би линколн, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 22 декабря 1501 г. в местности буртон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamon Sutton III nació aproximadamente 1455, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamon Sutton II, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Jane Gascoigne, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret Sheffield en 1477, en Burton by Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1501, en Burton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
